{"finish_reason": "stop", "text": "{
  "action": "keep",
  "confidence": 1.0,
  "criterion": "The assigned card (Real Time Monitoring Heatmap) is the EXACT visual metaphor for the story angle 'Live cross-feeder monitoring' and 'visual contrasts of instantaneous power states'. Swap candidates (56, 59, 13) are either dual-axis line charts (trends, not snapshots) or Sankey diagrams (flow/efficiency, not instantaneous state), failing the 'snapshot' and 'heatmap' requirements.",
  "morphs": {
    "heatmap.title": "Real Time Monitoring (Feeder Heatmap)",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[0].label": "Incomers",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[1].label": "UPS Feeders",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[2].label": "BPDB",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[3].label": "HHF Reactive",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[0].feeders[0].label": "Solar Incomer-1",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[0].feeders[1].label": "Solar Incomer-2",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[1].feeders[0].label": "UPS-01 CL:600KVA",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[1].feeders[1].label": "UPS-02 CL:600KVA",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[1].feeders[2].label": "UPS-03 CL:600KVA",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[1].feeders[3].label": "UPS-04 CL:600KVA",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[1].feeders[4].label": "UPS-05 CL:600KVA",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[1].feeders[5].label": "UPS-06 CL:600KVA",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[2].feeders[0].label": "BPDB-01 Lam-01&02",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[2].feeders[1].label": "BPDB-02 Lam-03&04",
    "heatmap.selectedSampleIndex": 11
  },
  "data_instructions": {
    "payload_shape": "heatmap",
    "orientation": "entity",
    "entity_dim": "feeder",
    "selection_dim": "metric",
    "selection_role": "produces",
    "binding": {
      "asset_id": "PCC-Panel-1",
      "table": "pcc_panel_1_feedbacks",
      "ts_col": "timestamp",
      "panel_id": null,
      "nameplate_scope": "default"
    },
    "window": {
      "lookback": "12 buckets",
      "sampling": "2s",
      "time_mode": "none"
    },
    "fetch": {
      "endpoint": "real-time-monitoring",
      "window_seconds": 30,
      "interval_seconds": 2,
      "sample_count": 12,
      "range": null,
      "start": null,
      "end": null,
      "sampling": null,
      "metrics": [
        "kw",
        "pf",
        "kva",
        "kvar",
        "current",
        "voltage",
        "iUnbalance"
      ],
      "selection": null
    },
    "fields": [],
    "roster": [
      {
        "slot": "heatmap.history[*].sections[*].feeders[*].kw",
        "kind": "raw",
        "role": "series",
        "metric": "kw",
        "unit": "kW",
        "agg": "last",
        "source": "live",
        "column": "active_power_total_kw"
      },
      {
        "slot": "heatmap.history[*].sections[*].feeders[*].pf",
        "kind": "raw",
        "role": "series",
        "metric": "pf",
        "unit": "",
        "agg": "last",
        "source": "live",
        "column": "kpi_true_pf"
      },
      {
        "slot": "heatmap.history[*].sections[*].feeders[*].kva",
        "kind": "raw",
        "role": "series",
        "metric": "kva",
        "unit": "kVA",
        "agg": "last",
        "source": "live",
        "column": "apparent_power_total_kva"
      },
      {
        "slot": "heatmap.history[*].sections[*].feeders[*].kvar",
        "kind": "raw",
        "role": "series",
        "metric": "kvar",
        "unit": "kVAr",
        "agg": "last",
        "source": "live",
        "column": "reactive_power_total_kvar"
      },
      {
        "slot": "heatmap.history[*].sections[*].feeders[*].current",
        "kind": "raw",
        "role": "series",
        "metric": "current",
        "unit": "A",
        "agg": "last",
        "source": "live",
        "column": "current_avg"
      },
      {
        "slot": "heatmap.history[*].sections[*].feeders[*].iUnbalance",
        "kind": "raw",
        "role": "series",
        "metric": "iUnbalance",
        "unit": "%",
        "agg": "last",
        "source": "live",
        "column": "current_unbalance_pct"
      },
      {
        "slot": "heatmap.history[0].sections[0].totalKw",
        "kind": "derived",
        "role": "kpi",
        "metric": "kw",
        "unit": "kW",
        "agg": "sum_magnitude",
        "source": "live",
        "base_columns": [
          "active_power_total_kw"
        ],
        "fn": "sum_magnitude"
      },
      {
        "slot": "heatmap.history[0].sections[1].totalKw",
        "kind": "derived",
        "role": "kpi",
        "metric": "kw",
        "unit": "kW",
        "agg": "sum_magnitude",
        "source": "live",
        "base_columns": [
          "active_power_total_kw"
        ],
        "fn": "sum_magnitude"
      },
      {
        "slot": "heatmap.history[0].sections[2].totalKw",
        "kind": "derived",
        "role": "kpi",
        "metric": "kw",
        "unit": "kW",
        "agg": "sum_magnitude",
        "source": "live",
        "base_columns": [
          "active_power_total_kw"
        ],
        "fn": "sum_magnitude"
      },
      {
        "slot": "heatmap.selectedSampleIndex",
        "kind": "const",
        "role": "tile",
        "metric": "index",
        "unit": "",
        "value": 11,
        "source": "const"
      }
    ],
    "_honest_blanked": [
      {
        "slot": "heatmap.history[*].sections[*].feeders[*].loadPct",
        "reason": "no rated_kva on gic_* (nameplate unknown) — cannot compute load %"
      },
      {
        "slot": "heatmap.history[*].sections[*].feeders[*].voltage",
        "reason": "voltage_avg not in DB SCHEMA for this meter class (gic_01_n8_bpdb_01_p1)"
      }
    ],
    "data_note": "Roster card: per-member data is filled from PRIMARY members' own rows. 'Solar Incomer-1' and 'Solar Incomer-2' are context-only (has_data=N) and will render as blank rows. 'UPS-05' and 'UPS-06' are context-only (has_data=N) and will render as blank rows. 'UPS-01' through 'UPS-04' and 'BPDB-01/02' have live data. 'loadPct' and 'voltage' slots are honest-blanked due to missing nameplate/rating and missing voltage column respectively."
  }
}", "usage": {"completion_tokens": 1999, "prompt_tokens": 16985, "prompt_tokens_details": null, "total_tokens": 18984}}

{"finish_reason": "stop", "text": "{
  "action": "keep",
  "confidence": 1.0,
  "criterion": "The heatmap provides an immediate visual snapshot of live power distribution across all LT-PCC feeders, allowing the user to instantly identify active load patterns and anomalies. The current card (Real Time Monitoring Heatmap) is the direct implementation of this story angle, whereas the swap candidates (Source Transfer, Output Load, Energy Flow) serve different analytical intents (Investigation, Efficiency) and do not provide the requested 'immediate visual snapshot' of power distribution.",
  "morphs": {
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[0].feeders[0].label": "Solar Incomer-1",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[0].feeders[0].shortLabel": "Solar Incomer-1",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[0].feeders[1].label": "Solar Incomer-2",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[0].feeders[1].shortLabel": "Solar Incomer-2",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[1].feeders[0].label": "UPS-01 CL:600KVA",

    "heatmap.history[0].sections[1].feeders[1].label": "UPS-02 CL:600KVA",

    "heatmap.history[0].sections[2].feeders[0].label": "BPDB-03 Lam-05&06",

    "heatmap.history[0].sections[3].feeders[3].shortLabel": "Canteen",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[3].feeders[4].label": "STP Panel",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[3].feeders[4].shortLabel": "STP",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[3].feeders[5].label": "AHU-5",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[3].feeders[5].shortLabel": "AHU-5",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[3].feeders[6].label": "MRPDB",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[3].feeders[6].shortLabel": "MRPDB",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[3].feeders[7].label": "AHU-6",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[3].feeders[7].shortLabel": "AHU-6",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[3].feeders[8].label": "AHU-7",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[3].feeders[8].shortLabel": "AHU-7",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[3].feeders[9].label": "MLDB",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[3].feeders[9].shortLabel": "MLDB",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[3].feeders[10].label": "Electrical Room North Side",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[3].feeders[10].shortLabel": "Elec Room",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[3].feeders[11].label": "Frisking+Security",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[3].feeders[11].shortLabel": "Frisking",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[3].feeders[12].label": "Axial Fan Panel-2",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[3].feeders[12].shortLabel": "Fan-2",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[3].feeders[13].label": "Air Washer-4",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[3].feeders[13].shortLabel": "Washer-4",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[3].feeders[14].label": "FCBC-1",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[3].feeders[14].shortLabel": "FCBC",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[3].feeders[15].label": "Air Washer Exhaust-04",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[3].feeders[15].shortLabel": "Exh-04",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[3].feeders[16].label": "Air Washer Exhaust-05",
    "heatmap.history[0].sections[3].feeders[16].shortLabel": "Exh-05",

  },
  "data_instructions": {
    "payload_shape": "heatmap",
    "orientation": "entity",
    "entity_dim": "feeder",
    "selection_dim": "metric",
    "selection_role": "produces",
    "binding": {
      "asset_id": "PCC-Panel-2",
      "table": "pcc_panel_2_feedbacks",
      "ts_col": "ts",
      "panel_id": null,
      "nameplate_scope": "default"
    },
    "window": {
      "lookback": "30s",
      "sampling": "2s",
      "time_mode": "none"
    },
    "fetch": {
      "endpoint": "real-time-monitoring",
      "window_seconds": 30,
      "interval_seconds": 2,
      "sample_count": 12,
      "range": null,
      "start": null,
      "end": null,
      "sampling": null,
      "metrics": [
        "kw",
        "pf",
        "kva",
        "kvar",
        "current",
        "voltage",
        "iUnbalance"
      ],
      "selection": "all"
    },
    "fields": [],
    "roster": [
      {
        "mode": "sections",
        "slot": "heatmap.history",
        "scope": "members",
        "sample": {
          "label": {
            "b": "ts_label",
            "fmt": "HH:MM:SS"
          },
          "element": {
            "id": {
              "a": "name",
              "b": "slug"
            },
            "kw": {
              "b": "col",
              "c": "active_power_total_kw",
              "q": "power",
              "r": 2
            },
            "pf": {
              "b": "prefer_abs",
              "r": 3,
              "cs": [
                "kpi_true_pf",
                "power_factor_total"
              ]
            },
            "kva": {
              "b": "col",
              "c": "apparent_power_total_kva",
              "q": "power",
              "r": 2
            },
            "kvar": {
              "b": "col",
              "c": "reactive_power_total_kvar",
              "r": 2,
              "keep_sign": true
            },
            "label": {
              "a": "name",
              "b": "attr"
            },
            "current": {
              "b": "col",
              "c": "current_avg",
              "r": 1
            },
            "loadPct": {
              "b": "null",
              "why": "no rated_kva on gic_*"
            },
            "voltage": {
              "b": "col",
              "c": "voltage_avg",
              "r": 1
            },
            "iUnbalance": {
              "b": "col",
              "c": "current_unbalance_pct",
              "r": 2
            },
            "shortLabel": {
              "a": "name",
              "b": "attr"
            }
          },
          "replace": "wholesale",
          "section": {
            "id": "slug_of_group",
            "label": "title_of_group"
          },
          "group_by": "section_defs",
          "match_by": [
            "type",
            "load_group",
            "name_prefix"
          ],
          "unmatched": {
            "id": "slug_of_load_group",
            "note": "members matching no section_def group into a derived section labeled from their load_group; deriveRosterFromHistory renders any section id — group, never drop",
            "label": "load_group",
            "policy": "derived_section"
          },
          "role_filter": "all",
          "section_agg": {
            "totalKw": {
              "r": 2,
              "of": "kw",
              "agg": "sum_magnitude"
            },
            "totalKva": {
              "r": 2,
              "of": "kva",
              "agg": "sum_magnitude"
            },
            "totalKvar": {
              "r": 2,
              "of": "kvar",
              "agg": "sum_magnitude"
            }
          },
          "elements_key": "feeders",
          "section_defs": [
            {
              "id": "incomers",
              "label": "Incomers",
              "roles": [
                "incoming"
              ],
              "types": [
                "incomer",
                "solar-incomer"
              ],
              "load_groups": [
                "incomer",
                "solar"
              ],
              "name_prefixes": [
                "incomer-",
                "solar-incomer-"
              ]
            },
            {
              "id": "ups",
              "label": "UPS Feeders",
              "types": [
                "ups"
              ],
              "load_groups": [
                "ups"
              ],
              "name_prefixes": [
                "ups-"
              ]
            },
            {
              "id": "bpdb",
              "label": "BPDB",
              "types": [
                "bpdb"
              ],
              "load_groups": [
                "bpdb"
              ],
              "name_prefixes": [
                "bpdb-"
              ]
            },
            {
              "id": "hhf",
              "label": "HHF Reactive",
              "types": [
                "hhf"
              ],
              "load_groups": [
                "hhf"
              ],
              "name_prefixes": [
                "hhf-"
              ]
            }
          ],
          "incomers_rule": "role='incoming' members MUST appear in the incomers section — never excluded from heatmap.history (PCC-4 defect 2026-07-03: _reporting_pairs dropped them)",
          "reporting_only": false,
          "incomers_included": true,
          "empty_members_rule": "zero-row members are KEPT as blank rows (per-LEAF degradation, 2026-07-03 sweep fix): a dark meter is a real entity with honest-null readings, exactly like the kept blank incomers; dropping it hid the whole GIC-05 section. Coverage stays the honest telemetry."
        }
      },
      {
        "v": 0,
        "mode": "const",
        "slot": "heatmap.selectedSampleIndex"
      }
    ],
    "coverage_attach": "widgets._coverage",
    "data_note": "Roster card: data is driven by the roster_spec above, which fans out to the PRIMARY panel members (GIC-03-N10-AHU-8, GIC-03-N1-Curing Line CSU-02, GIC-03-N3-Utility Panel-1, GIC-03-N4-Canteen Building, GIC-03-N5-STP Panel, GIC-03-N6-AHU-5, GIC-03-N7-MRPDB, GIC-03-N8-AHU-6, GIC-03-N9-AHU-7, GIC-04-N10-MLDB, GIC-04-N3-BPDB-03 For Lamination-05&06, GIC-04-N8-BPDB-04 For Lamination-07&08, GIC-05-N10-Electrical Room North Side, GIC-05-N1-Air Washer-4, GIC-05-N3-FCBC, GIC-05-N4-Air Washer Exhaust-04, GIC-05-N5-Air Washer Exhaust-05, GIC-05-N6-Air Washer-5, GIC-05-N7-Air Washer-6). Members with has_data=N (GIC-03-N2-Axial Fan Panel-1, GIC-05-N11-Frisking+Security, GIC-05-N12-Axial Fan Panel-2) are kept as blank rows per the empty_members_rule. The 'loadPct' slot is honest-blanked because the asset's nameplate (rated_kva) is unknown ('—'), making the denominator for load percentage unavailable. The roster identifiers in the metadata have been re-rostered to the real member names from the PANEL MEMBERS facts."
  }
}", "usage": {"completion_tokens": 3539, "prompt_tokens": 17536, "prompt_tokens_details": null, "total_tokens": 21075}}
